author: mark
text: Touched to demo the issues plugin firing on update — should mirror to GH issue.

author: mark
text:
README: document the native plugin protocol

README's Plugin System section now covers the native-protocol surface plugin authors need: the describe response (subscriptions, projection {owns/reads/external_prefixes}, retry_budget, wants_context), the propose request/response (ok, conflict, reject) with commit_policy variants, per-event semantics including create's describe-gated handshake and drop's observe-only restriction (required/gating on drop is a config-validation error), and the EventCtx v1 schema delivered via --ctx-file.

The new subsection sits between the diagnostics channel and the sync lifecycle sections, so the existing legacy push/sync material is undisturbed and the native opt-in story flows directly into the participant-enforcement detail that follows. Cross-links docs/SPEC-lifecycle-sync-participants.md for the formal contract instead of duplicating its projection algebra, retry/commit-policy composition rules, or conformance test list — README stays a how-to, the SPEC stays authoritative.
